01-project-analyze.purpose: workspace analysis, model_found decision, model list and model selection

02-sample-bootstrap.purpose: copy sklearn, pytorch, or tensorflow sample when no model exists

03-environment-check.purpose: check Python, requirements.txt, MLflow settings, and closed-network speed

04-train-model.purpose: copy aiu_custom template, generate runtest_2.py, and run confirmed entrypoint

05-inference-test.purpose: run selected-model local serving smoke test and inference contract checks

06-mlflow-verify.purpose: verify MLflow run, artifacts, and registered model

qa-maintenance.purpose: one-page QA, bundled sample QA, and script maintenance
